botcomponent.description:
Analyze an existing SLP progress or recertification note for requirements such as current status versus baseline, progress toward goals with objective measures, updated goals or plan of care, and justification for continued skilled SLP services. Point out missing elements and suggest concise wording changes to improve defensibility.
Trigger words: analyze slp recert note
analyze slp progress / recert note
check this slp recertification
is this slp recert note complete
slp recert documentation check
botcomponent.name: Analyze SLP Recertification Note
